data.title: Monolithic to Microservices
data.description: Transition from a monolithic architecture to a microservices-based architecture for improved scalability and development agility.
data.technical_spec: Implement distributed services with APIs using containers and orchestration tools like Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN) Optimization
data.description: Optimize the use of CDNs to ensure efficient video delivery across global regions.
data.technical_spec: Employ multiple CDN nodes with load balancing mechanisms and adaptive bitrate streaming.

data.title: Database Sharding and Caching
data.description: Utilize database sharding and caching to efficiently handle large data volumes and high query loads.
data.technical_spec: Implement NoSQL databases with Redis for caching and partitioning user data across different database nodes.

data.title: Service-oriented Architecture (SOA)
data.description: Adopt a service-oriented architecture to improve modularity and service management.
data.technical_spec: Implement independent services that communicate over the network through RESTful APIs or SOAP.

data.title: Automated Deployment Pipelines
data.description: Set up automated pipelines for rapid deployments and testing to improve software delivery performance.
data.technical_spec: Use CI/CD tools like Jenkins or GitLab CI integrated with version control systems and testing suites.
